problem id: 264b2118
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(2) AND NOT SHL(5)

examples:
  01101010 -> 10101001
  00100011 -> 10001100
  01010100 -> 01010001
  11101100 -> 00110011
  10001010 -> 00101010
  10110100 -> 01010010
  11000011 -> 00001111
  00000100 -> 00010000
  11000110 -> 00011011
  00001100 -> 00110000

query: 00101101
predicted answer: 00010100
